Lightyear (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $118,307,188Details
International Box Office $108,118,232
Worldwide Box Office $226,425,420
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,865,060
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,275,705
Total $4,140,765
Further financial details...

Synopsis

A sci-fi action adventure and the definitive origin story of Buzz Lightyear, the hero who inspired the toy, “Lightyear” follows the legendary Space Ranger after he’s marooned on a hostile planet 4.2 million light-years from Earth alongside his commander and their crew. As Buzz tries to find a way back home through space and time, he’s joined by a group of ambitious recruits and his charming robot companion cat, Sox. Complicating matters and threatening the mission is the arrival of Zurg, an imposing presence with an army of ruthless robots and a mysterious agenda.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$50,577,961 (42.8% of total gross)
Legs:2.34 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:52.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$200,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,255 opening theaters/4,255 max. theaters, 4.1 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $134,373,602

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 17th, 2022 (Wide) by Walt Disney
June 17th, 2022 (IMAX) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Finland)
June 15th, 2022 (Wide), released as Lightyear - La vera storia di Buzz (Italy)
June 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
June 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Sweden)
June 15th, 2022 (Wide) (Netherlands)
Video Release: August 3rd, 2022 by Disney+

Synopsis

A sci-fi action adventure and the definitive origin story of Buzz Lightyear, the hero who inspired the toy, “Lightyear” follows the legendary Space Ranger after he’s marooned on a hostile planet 4.2 million light-years from Earth alongside his commander and their crew. As Buzz tries to find a way back home through space and time, he’s joined by a group of ambitious recruits and his charming robot companion cat, Sox. Complicating matters and threatening the mission is the arrival of Zurg, an imposing presence with an army of ruthless robots and a mysterious agenda.
